products:
Softdel offers a range of products including:
• Communication protocol stacks (BACnet, Modbus, HART, DMX)
• IoT Gateway & Platform solutions (EdificeEdge, EdificePlus)
• A BACnet Simulator (BOSS) for device testing and simulation

Would you like details about any specific product?
